title: sesleria tatrae
intro: Sesleria tatrae, also known as Tatra fescue, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sesleria tatrae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Sesleria tatrae is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
